---
title: "TypeScript notebook"
format: html
categories:
  - utility
---

## Interactive TypeScript notebook (browser only)

This page is a secondary notebook for your TypeScript notes. Like the
landing page, it only executes code when you click the Run button.

```{ojs}
import {Inputs} from "@observablehq/inputs"

// --- Editable TypeScript / JavaScript source -------------------------------

DEFAULT_TS_NOTES_CODE = [
  "// Example TypeScript snippet for notes (edit me)",
  "",
  "type User = { name: string }",
  "",
  "function describeUser(user: User): string {",
  "  return `User: ${user.name}`;",
  "}",
  "",
  "console.log(describeUser({ name: \"Alice\" }));"
].join("\n")

editor = html`<div style="display:flex;gap:0.5rem;align-items:flex-start;">
  <textarea id="ts-notes-editor"
    spellcheck="false"
    style="width:100%;min-height:220px;font-family:ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;font-size:13px;line-height:1.5;border:1px solid #ddd;border-radius:6px;padding:8px;">${DEFAULT_TS_NOTES_CODE}</textarea>
</div>`

// Attach copy-to-clipboard behavior (runs in browser)
copyManager = {
  if (typeof window === 'undefined') return
  function attach() {
    const btn = document.getElementById('copy-code')
    const ta = document.getElementById('ts-notes-editor')
    if (!btn || !ta) return
    const originalHTML = btn.innerHTML
    btn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
      try {
        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(ta.value)
        btn.innerHTML = '✓'
        setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = originalHTML }, 900)
      } catch (e) {
        btn.innerHTML = '⚠'
        setTimeout(() => { btn.innerHTML = originalHTML }, 900)
      }
    })
  }
  if (document.readyState === 'complete') attach(); else window.addEventListener('load', attach, { once: true })
  return null
}

// --- Lazy loader for the TypeScript compiler ------------------------------

loadTypeScript = (url = "https://unpkg.com/typescript@5.4.5/lib/typescript.js") =>
  new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
    if (window.ts) return resolve(window.ts);
    const s = document.createElement("script");
    s.src = url;
    s.async = true;
    s.onload = () => resolve(window.ts);
    s.onerror = reject;
    document.head.appendChild(s);
  })

// --- Run button (manual trigger) ------------------------------------------

viewof runNotes = Inputs.button("\u25b6")

// --- Result cell: only re-runs when Run is clicked ------------------------

notesResult = {
  const clicks = runNotes

  if (clicks == null || clicks === 0) {
    return html`<div style="min-height:3rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;padding:0.5rem;background-color:#fafafa;"></div>`
  }

  const textarea = document.getElementById("ts-notes-editor")
  const code = textarea ? textarea.value : ""

  let js
  try {
    const ts = await loadTypeScript()
    const out = ts.transpileModule(code, {
      compilerOptions: {
        module: ts.ModuleKind.None,
        target: ts.ScriptTarget.ES2018,
        sourceMap: false
      }
    })
    js = out.outputText
  } catch (e) {
    return html`<div style="min-height:3rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;padding:0.5rem;background-color:#fafafa;">
      <pre style="margin:0;color:#b30000;white-space:pre-wrap;">[Transpile error]\n${String(e?.stack || e)}</pre>
    </div>`
  }

  const logs = []
  const originalLog = console.log
  console.log = (...args) => {
    logs.push(args.map(x => String(x)).join(" "))
    originalLog(...args)
  }

  let error = null
  try {
    const fn = new Function("exports", js)
    fn({})
  } catch (e) {
    error = e
  } finally {
    console.log = originalLog
  }

  if (error) {
    return html`<div style="min-height:3rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;padding:0.5rem;background-color:#fafafa;">
      <pre style="margin:0;color:#b30000;white-space:pre-wrap;">[Runtime error]\n${String(error?.stack || error)}</pre>
    </div>`
  }

  const text = logs.length ? logs.join("\n") : "(no console.log output)"
  return html`<div style="min-height:3rem;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;padding:0.5rem;background-color:#fafafa;">
    <pre style="margin:0;white-space:pre-wrap;">${text}</pre>
  </div>`
}

// --- Layout: editor + Run button + output ---------------------------------

html`<div style="display:grid;gap:0.75rem;">
  <div>
    <div style="font:600 14px/1.4 system-ui;margin-bottom:4px;">TypeScript / JavaScript (editable)</div>
    ${editor}
  </div>
  <div>${viewof runNotes}</div>
  <div>
    <div style="font:600 14px/1.4 system-ui;margin-bottom:4px;">Output</div>
    ${notesResult}
  </div>
</div>`
```
